top_findings: Star rating discrepancy (4.5 schema vs 4.9 displayed)
Geo coordinates 5km off (wrong part of Varanasi)
Blog content JavaScript-only (invisible to AI crawlers)

findings.title: robots.txt returns 404
findings.description: No robots.txt file deployed. Returns Hostinger 404 page instead. Blocks crawlers and prevents Sitemap directive.
findings.recommendation: Create /robots.txt with at minimum: User-agent: * / Allow: / / Sitemap: https://www.mosaichostels.com/sitemap.xml

findings.title: www/non-www duplicate content
findings.description: Both mosaichostels.com and www.mosaichostels.com return HTTP 200 with identical content. No redirect or canonical consolidation.
findings.recommendation: Add 301 redirect from non-www to www at server level, OR add canonical tags to all pages pointing to www variant.

findings.title: Missing canonical tags on 5 pages
findings.description: index.html, gallery.html, about.html, contact.html, book-now.html have no canonical. blog.html has non-www canonical; privacy.html includes .html extension.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='canonical' href='https://www.mosaichostels.com/'> to every page, standardized to www extensionless URLs.

findings.title: No H1 tag on any page
findings.description: All 7 pages missing H1. Homepage has H2 as first heading. H1 is primary on-page relevance signal.
findings.recommendation:
Add one H1 per page targeting primary keyword. Homepage example:

Budget Hostel in Varanasi near Assi Ghat

findings.title: Cache-Control: no-cache disables browser caching
findings.description: All responses include 'cache-control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate'. Disables browser and CDN edge caching entirely.
findings.recommendation: Set long TTL for static assets: 'Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000' for CSS/JS/images; 'max-age=3600' for HTML.

findings.title: 8 images missing width/height attributes
findings.description: All images lack width and height attributes. No CSS aspect-ratio set. Causes CLS (layout shift) as images load.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit width and height to every tag matching rendered display size.

findings.title: No HSTS (Strict-Transport-Security) header
findings.description: Browser cannot enforce HTTPS-only on subsequent visits. SSL stripping attacks remain possible.
findings.recommendation: Add to .htaccess: Header always set Strict-Transport-Security 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains'

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: 'Best Hostels in Varanasi' post (9.9KB) targets real informational queries
Solo female traveler guide addresses specific persona
Content locally specific with real data (pricing, distances, venues)

findings.title: Founding year contradiction
findings.description: Homepage/About/schema state 'Est. 2025'. Three blog posts claim 'welcoming since 2019'. Direct factual conflict.
findings.recommendation: Determine true founding date. Update all pages to match. If 2019, fix EST. 2025 everywhere; if 2025, fix blog posts.

findings.title: Star rating discrepancy
findings.description: Schema: aggregateRating.ratingValue = 4.5. Homepage stats band = '4.9★'. Google uses schema for rich snippets. Contradiction is trust violation.
findings.recommendation: Verify real current rating from Booking.com or GBP. Update schema and homepage to match single verified number.

findings.title: Blog content rendered client-side only
findings.description: All 6 blog posts fetched via JavaScript from /blogs/*.md markdown files. HTML source contains empty div. No OG tags on post pages.
findings.recommendation: Server-render blog at build time using Python markdown library. Generate static HTML post pages OR pre-render HTML alongside JS for crawlers.

findings.title: Email inconsistency (hello@ vs gmail.com)
findings.description: Blog posts use hello@mosaichostels.com. About/schema use mosaichostels@gmail.com. Creates NAP inconsistency signal.
findings.recommendation: Standardize to domain email (mosaichostels@gmail.com or hello@mosaichostels.com) across all pages and communications.

findings.title: 5 blog posts below 1,500-word floor
findings.description: Four posts (550–638 words) compete vs 2,000–4,000 word Lonely Planet/Culture Trip pieces on same topics.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 1,500+ words with deeper local specifics, internal linking, and FAQ sections matching competitor depth.

findings.title: hostel-near-assi-ghat.md garbled prose
findings.description: Post missing articles/conjunctions throughout: 'sits southern tip', 'quieter than Dashashwamedh', 'different Varanasi'. Incoherent.
findings.recommendation: Complete rewrite. Quality raters will flag as low-quality content. Current state risks helpfulness signal penalty.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Meta descriptions are descriptive and location-aware
All pages have meta viewport tag

findings.title: Homepage title 'Mosaic Hostel — Classy Design' lacks location
findings.description: Title has no location keyword. 'Classy Design' conveys nothing about hostel/Varanasi. Google already rewrites it in some SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Change to: 'Mosaic Hostel Varanasi — Budget Hostel near Assi Ghat' or 'Hostel Varanasi | Dorms from ₹499 | Assi Ghat'

findings.title: Duplicate meta descriptions on 5 pages
findings.description: index, gallery, about, contact, book-now all share: 'Budget Hostel in Varanasi near Assi Ghat | Backpacker Stay, Local Tips & Travel Guides'
findings.recommendation: Create unique descriptions per page targeting each page's primary intent. Each 1–2 sentences.

findings.title: No pricing visible anywhere
findings.description: First question for every hostel search is price. Competitors show 'from ₹499' in SERP snippets. Mosaic shows nothing.
findings.recommendation: Add 'Dorms from ₹499 per night' to homepage hero and book-now headline. Increases CTR from SERP.

findings.title: No geo meta tags
findings.description: Missing <meta name='geo.position'>, geo.placename, ICBM tags that signal location for some crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Add: <meta name='geo.position' content='25.28726;83.00316'> and <meta name='geo.placename' content='Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India'>

findings.title: No room/service-specific pages
findings.description: All room types, pricing, facilities presented on homepage only. No pages for 'private room Varanasi' or 'female dorm Assi Ghat'.
findings.recommendation: Consider room-type landing pages if competitive (unlikely for single property) or keep consolidated on homepage + internal link from blog.

findings.title: amenityFeature uses invalid @type: 'Text'
findings.description: All pages: {"@type": "Text", "name": "Free WiFi"}. Text is a DataType, not valid for amenityFeature. Should be LocationFeatureSpecification.
findings.recommendation: Replace with: {"@type": "LocationFeatureSpecification", "name": "Free WiFi", "value": true}

findings.title: AggregateRating missing bestRating/worstRating
findings.description: Schema shows ratingValue: 4.5 without bestRating/worstRating. Scale ambiguous (out of 5? 10?). Google may flag as invalid.
findings.recommendation: Add: "bestRating": "5", "worstRating": "1" to clarify the scale.

findings.title: Hostel block on non-hostel pages
findings.description: Blog listing, privacy policy, and gallery all carry full Hostel block with url pointing to homepage. Confuses entity graph.
findings.recommendation: Keep Hostel block only on homepage and contact page. Replace on others with page-appropriate types (Blog, WebPage, ContactPage).

findings.title: Geo coordinates 5km off
findings.description: Schema: latitude 25.3239, longitude 82.9789. Correct: 25.28726, 83.00316 (Assi Ghat vs Sigra/Cantonment area).
findings.recommendation: Update geo coordinates to correct Assi Ghat location. This tells crawlers and AI systems the hostel's true location.

findings.title: Missing WebSite schema on homepage
findings.description: Homepage has no WebSite type. Enables Google Sitelinks Search Box feature in SERP.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite block to homepage with name and searchAction (optional).

findings.title: Missing BreadcrumbList on 6 inner pages
findings.description: None of the 6 non-homepage pages (about, gallery, blog, contact, book-now, privacy) have BreadcrumbList markup.
findings.recommendation: Add per-page BreadcrumbList showing path: Home > [Page Name]. Template provided in full audit report.

findings.title: TTFB 620ms — Hostinger shared hosting bottleneck
findings.description: Root document takes 620ms before any byte arrives. Shared hosting, no edge CDN. Shifts all downstream metrics right.
findings.recommendation: Enable Cloudflare (free tier) orange-cloud proxy or Hostinger LiteSpeed Cache. Expected TTFB reduction: 150–200ms.

findings.title: Render-blocking Google Fonts
findings.description: Google Fonts CSS blocks render: 1,698ms wasted (desktop), 1,152ms (mobile). Current approach waits for fonts before first paint.
findings.recommendation: Add preconnect + preload hints, or self-host 3 font files (87KB total). Expected LCP improvement: 500–900ms.

findings.title: Hero video 2.6MB unoptimized
findings.description: hero-video.webm is 2.6MB on mobile. Uncompressed, not preload-controlled. Dominant payload item.
findings.recommendation: Add preload='none' or preload='metadata' to video tag. On mobile, suppress video via CSS media query, show poster image instead.

findings.title: Unoptimized JPEG images
findings.description: 6 JPEGs: 466KB, 463KB, 412KB, 267KB, 129KB, 116KB. Converting to WebP: estimated 1.6–1.7MB savings.
findings.recommendation: Batch convert with cwebp -q 80. Add WebP variants. Update img src to use format detection.

findings.title: No LCP preload strategy
findings.description: Hero image (IMG_1928.JPG) has no <link rel='preload'> or fetchpriority='high'. Browser doesn't prioritize it.
findings.recommendation: Add: <link rel='preload' as='image' href='/images/IMG_1928.JPG' fetchpriority='high'>

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Schema.org JSON-LD present on main pages
'Best Hostels' post has strong citability format (FAQ-style)
About page has self-contained narrative paragraphs

findings.title: GPTBot blocked in local robots.txt
findings.description: Current local robots.txt has 'User-agent: GPTBot / Disallow: /'. When deployed, will completely block ChatGPT from indexing.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'User-agent: GPTBot / Allow: /'. Remove all AI bot blocks unless you want to exclude ChatGPT visibility.

findings.title: Blog content JavaScript-only (invisible to AI crawlers)
findings.description: All 6 markdown posts rendered client-side. GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot do not execute JavaScript. Posts invisible.
findings.recommendation: Server-render blog at build time. All blog content must be in HTML source for AI crawlers to see it.

findings.title: Missing llms.txt (machine-readable site description)
findings.description: No /llms.txt file. Perplexity and Claude both check for this. Missed signal for AI systems.
findings.recommendation: Create /llms.txt with brief site description, page inventory, and canonicalization info. 45-min effort.

findings.title: Blog posts not in sitemap
findings.description: sitemap.xml lists 7 pages; 6 blog posts omitted. Crawlers and AI systems have no explicit signal they exist.
findings.recommendation: Add all 6 blog post URLs to sitemap with lastmod dates.

findings.title: No author attribution
findings.description: Zero author names on any page or blog post. AI systems cannot cite 'written by expert' — only cite the brand.
findings.recommendation: Add: 'Written by the Mosaic Hostel team, based in Varanasi' or name individual authors if applicable.

findings.title: Rating inconsistency triggers AI confidence loss
findings.description: Schema 4.5 vs page 4.9 means AI systems extracting both will flag the mismatch or discard the value.
findings.recommendation: Resolve rating contradiction immediately (see Content Quality findings).

categories.name: Images
what_works: All images have alt text (zero missing)

findings.title: 8 images missing width/height (CLS risk)
findings.description: All images lack width and height attributes. Causes CLS as images load without browser reserving space.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit width and height to every tag matching rendered display size.

findings.title: Unoptimized JPEG files
findings.description: Files: 466KB, 463KB, 412KB, 267KB. Uncompressed originals. WebP conversion would save 1.6–1.7MB.
findings.recommendation: Batch convert with cwebp tool. Target Q80 quality. Update HTML to serve WebP with JPEG fallback.

findings.title: No og:image on any page
findings.description: Zero og:image meta tags. Social shares (WhatsApp, Facebook, LinkedIn) show blank preview cards.
findings.recommendation: Add <meta property='og:image' content='https://www.mosaichostels.com/images/IMG_1928.JPG'> to all pages.

findings.title: Gallery alt texts generic
findings.description: Alt texts: 'Room View', 'Common Space', 'Wandering Souls'. Non-descriptive. 'Private room in Varanasi hostel' would be better.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite alts to describe content + location: 'Private double room at Mosaic Hostel Varanasi with shared bathroom'

findings.title: Logo oversized (132KB PNG)
findings.description: mosaic-logo-main.png is 132KB. Likely has unnecessary transparency or resolution.
findings.recommendation: Compress to <20KB. If PNG, consider WEBP conversion.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Resolve founding year (pick one, standardize all pages)
Resolve star rating (verify real, sync schema + homepage)
Fix geo coordinates to correct Assi Ghat location
Add 301 redirect www→www OR canonical tags on all pages

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Unique meta descriptions on 5 duplicate pages

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand 4 thin blog posts to 1,500+ words
Pull 3–5 guest reviews with attribution onto homepage/about
Add BlogPosting schema to blog posts
Get listed on India OTAs (Justdial, MakeMyTrip, Agoda, Goibibo)
Add preconnect hints for Google Fonts
Suppress hero video on mobile, use poster image

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Monitor GSC for blog post indexation
Track Core Web Vitals via CrUX field data
Verify ChatGPT/Perplexity indexation after bot fixes
Monitor GBP for review velocity (3+ week drought = danger)
Track keyword rankings via GSC or Bing

expected_outcome.improvements: Material organic traffic increases, improved AI visibility, better local rankings
